derived.causal_summary: Ran a verify-first batch fix over the top 5 of 40 scouted candidate defects: an 8-agent scout selected the targets, 5 parallel gpt-5.5-fast deep-dives confirmed/refuted each headline (the two pre-try lease-leak headlines REFUTED — all throws precede lease acquisition; the one post-acquisition call swallows its errors — but each target still had a real lesser defect), and 5 disjoint-file implement agents fixed the confirmed defects across 10 files. Three security hardenings (worktree-reaper eval->argv-array, setup-cp-sandbox rm-rf guard, advisor IPC DR-008 port) and two MCP-server bug fixes (file-watcher close()-blocks-on-backoff hang, scan lease heartbeat). Every fix stack-verified; both MCP builds exit 0.
